label: DhfR
note: Type I (DfrA1) trimethoprim-resistant dihydrofolate reductase from transposon Tn7 - a 157-aa FolA-fold enzyme (EC 1.5.1.3); the catalogued sequence is the UniProt P00382 canonical.

functional_claims.label: Confers trimethoprim resistance (Tn7 type I dihydrofolate reductase, DfrA1).
